birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Germany it is on the "Red List" as a species threatened by extinction and is no longer found in the lower mountainous areas of Bavaria; in the Bavarian Forest, the Black Forest and the Harz mountains, numbers of surviving western capercaillies decline even under massive efforts to breed them in captivity and release them into the wild
